transcription.text: If you're just cleaning but not sanitizing your pet stains, you might be living in a petri dish of bacteria. New Woolite Advanced Pet Stain and Odor Remover Plus Sanitize is a revolutionary carpet and upholstery cleaner that permanently removes tough pet stains and kills 99.9% of bacteria. For carpet and upholstery that are actually as clean as they look. Don't just clean, sanitize with new Woolite Sanitizing Pet Stain Cleaner.
